testcase.name: login page has correct form elements
login form shows validation errors
testcase.error:
[chromium] › browser/auth.spec.ts:21:1 › login form shows validation errors ──────────────────────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.waitForFunction: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
66 | // Wait for React to flush state updates - wait for error text content to appear 67 | // Use a more explicit wait that checks for actual text content > 68 | await page.waitForFunction( | ^ 69 | () => { 70 | const emailErrorEl = document.getElementById('email-error') 71 | const passwordErrorEl = document.getElementById('password-error') at /home/vivi/pixelated/tests/browser/auth.spec.ts:68:14
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/browser-auth-login-form-shows-validation-errors-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/browser-auth-login-form-shows-validation-errors-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/browser-auth-login-form-shows-validation-errors-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: login form is properly visible on mobile viewport
login page has proper transitions
testcase.error:
[chromium] › browser/auth.spec.ts:130:1 › login page has proper transitions ──────────────────────
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.waitForFunction: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
161 | // Wait for React to process the state update and render the reset password heading 162 | // Use waitForFunction to explicitly wait for the heading element to appear in the DOM > 163 | await page.waitForFunction( | ^ 164 | () => { 165 | const heading = document.querySelector( 166 | '[data-testid="reset-password-heading"]', at /home/vivi/pixelated/tests/browser/auth.spec.ts:163:14
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/browser-auth-login-page-has-proper-transitions-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/browser-auth-login-page-has-proper-transitions-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/browser-auth-login-page-has-proper-transitions-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: Home page should work in all browsers
testcase.system-out:
Testing Home page in chromium Going to / Page title: Pixelated Empathy | Clinical simulation for therapist training and supervision - Pixelated Empathy
[[ATTACHMENT|../../test-results/browser-browser-compatibil-8fd92-should-work-in-all-browsers-chromium/test-failed-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|../../test-results/browser-browser-compatibil-8fd92-should-work-in-all-browsers-chromium/video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|../../test-results/browser-browser-compatibil-8fd92-should-work-in-all-browsers-chromium/error-context.md]]
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › browser/browser-compatibility.spec.ts:21:3 › Home page should work in all browsers ──
Error: expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality
- Expected - 1 + Received + 4
- Array [] + Array [ + "Access to fetch at 'https://o4509483611979776.ingest.us.sentry.io/api/4510990116192256/envelope/?sentry_version=7&sentry_key=71a4e2cb3144ab66a823f8cfc7d9959d&sentry_client=sentry.javascript.astro%2F10.48.0' from origin 'http://127.0.0.1:4323' has been blocked by CORS policy: Request header field cf-access-client-id is not allowed by Access-Control-Allow-Headers in preflight response.", + "Failed to load resource: net::ERR_FAILED", + ]
81 | 82 | // Verify there are no console errors (except for known ones) > 83 | expect(errors.filter((e) => !e.includes('process is not defined'))).toEqual( | ^ 84 | [], 85 | ) 86 | }) at /home/vivi/pixelated/tests/browser/browser-compatibility.spec.ts:83:73
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/browser-browser-compatibil-8fd92-should-work-in-all-browsers-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../test-results/browser-browser-compatibil-8fd92-should-work-in-all-browsers-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../test-results/browser-browser-compatibil-8fd92-should-work-in-all-browsers-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: CSS feature support check
testcase.system-out: CSS features support in chromium: { flexbox: [33mtrue[39m, grid: [33mtrue[39m, variables: [33mtrue[39m, sticky: [33mtrue[39m, animations: [33mtrue[39m, filters: [33mtrue[39m, aspectRatio: [33mtrue[39m }
